subcodes.title: Seal of Baha’u’llah #12
subcodes.first_line: The ancient beauty has been established upon the most great throne.  Whereupon the tongue of grandeur and majesty that belongs to the lote-tree beyond which there is no passing
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد استقر جمال القدم علی العرش الاعظم اذا نطق لسان العظمه و الکبریا عند سدره
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God as tree of life; sadratu'l-muntaha, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @self-concealment of the Manifestation of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @mission of the Manifestation of God in the world
